title: heterotis pygmaea
intro: Heterotis pygmaea, also known as Dwarf Heterotis, is a small, flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and act as an anti-inflammatory. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, including reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease and improving immune function. Traditionally, Heterotis pygmaea is prepared as a tea or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties and is also used in some herbal remedies.
